description: BizToc is a news aggregation service focused on business and finance articles. Its public API provides access to recent news items, including query-based retrieval.
summary: Biztoc.com exposes one public HTTP API for business news, documented by an OpenAPI spec at `https://api.apis.guru/v2/specs/biztoc.com/v1/openapi.json` with base URL `https://ai.biztoc.com`.
